calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:08AM
Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, Helen Hendricks, appears in Pro Per, appellant, Ruth M. Bell, appears in Pro Per.
9:10AM
Court recesses briefly to allow Ms. Hendricks to get a witness who is waiting downstairs.
9:20AM
All present, court resumes. Parties, having been previously sworn, testify in the narrative.
EXH1 - 3 pages: 2 pages, Housing Authority inventory list, 1 page, Appellant's list of damages. Evidence is marked and admitted. There was no testimony by any other witnesses.
10:12AM
Court adjourns, matter is submitted. The Court retains the evidence.
